creator: ny2007ltd@gmail.com
text:
Reason if this ticket - to add information on freebsd.org WWW itself (inside "Errata/Open issues"), that FreeBSD versions 12,13,14 are not usable now as classic PPPD/TCP server because problematic kernel code.

So people, which need PPPD, will not waste time on its installation or update, and they will use FreeBSD 11 until question will be solved in versions 12,13,14.
